name: Summit Hotel Properties Inc. 5.875% Series F Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock $0.01 par value per share
summary: Summit Hotel Properties Inc. is a REIT that owns a portfolio of lodging properties, and this ticker represents one of their series of preferred stocks. These preferred shares offer a fixed dividend rate and have preference over common stock in the event of liquidation. The company is based in Austin, Texas.
